chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, CIRCUIT COURT, HYDERABAD C.P. No.D-520 of 2014 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE For orders on office objection For orders on M.A.3119/2014 For hearing of main case 18.05.2022 This petition challenges an oral / verbal order of the respondents i.e. Sui Southern Gas Company Ltd. of the year 1991 that concerns with the termination of the petitioner. He claimed it to be discrimination. At the very outset this petition suffers from laches as purported verbal termination was challenged in the year 2014 after almost 23 years. In view of above, the petition suffers from laches and is accordingly dismissed. JUDGE JUDGE Ali Haider
